findings.description: Officials' header information is duplicated at the top of the HTML rendering, causing a reader to encounter the same content twice before reaching the agenda.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the officials (Josh Stein/Governor, D. Reid Wilson/Secretary, Sushma Masemore/Deputy Secretary) appear once in the letterhead. In the HTML (chunk 1), the same names appear first as plain extracted text at the very top, then again within a rendered letterhead section below, duplicating the header content within the same continuous document.
